name: Seafood Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1/4 lb Salt pork or bacon diced
1 cup Evaporated milk or 10% light cream
recipeInstructions: Thaw the fish fillets if using frozen and cut into 1 1/2 inch cubes. Dice the salt pork or bacon into half pieces and fry in a frying pan until crisp and brown. Remove the pork or bacon and set aside. Sauté the onion and celery in the remaining fat until tender. Dissolve the bouillon cube in boiling water and add to the vegetables. Add the potatoes and seasonings. Cover and simmer until the potatoes are tender. Add the chunks of fish and cook until the fish is tender. Add evaporated milk or cream and milk. Heat gently to blend flavors, but do not boil; otherwise, the chowder may curdle. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary. Serve garnished with pork scraps or bacon bits.
